reference: Hello there, I am currently experiencing discomfort and have been for the last three weeks in the left side of my back. I suspect it might be related to my kidney. I am passing urine very regularly, although it is not painful to pass. I had a magnetic resonance imaging scan back in two thousand and ten which reported mild left renal prominence. I have tried not to dwell on this, but this problem is reoccurring and again causing me discomfort. What can I do?
text: Hello there. I am currently experiencing discomfort and have been for the last three weeks in the left side of my back. I suspect it might be related to my kidney. I am passing urine very regularly, although it is not painful to pass. I had a magnetic resonance imaging scan back in 2010, which reported mild left renal prominence. I have tried not to dwell on this, but this problem is reoccurring and again causing me discomfort. What can I do?
